title: Impact of Amazonian deforestation on precipitation reverses between seasons
titleCn: 亚马逊森林砍伐对降水的影响在季节间逆转
summary: Our study published in Nature reveals that the impact of Amazonian deforestation on precipitation reverses between wet and dry seasons, providing critical insights for conservation policy.
summaryCn: 我们发表于 Nature 的研究揭示了亚马逊森林砍伐对降水的影响在旱季和雨季之间逆转，为保护政策提供了关键见解。

title: Record-breaking 2023 marine heatwaves published in Science
titleCn: 2023年破纪录的海洋热浪研究发表于 Science
summary: Our research on record-breaking 2023 marine heatwaves, published in Science, documents unprecedented ocean warming events and their implications for marine ecosystems and infrastructure.
summaryCn: 我们发表于 Science 的关于2023年破纪录海洋热浪的研究，记录了前所未有的海洋变暖事件及其对海洋生态系统和基础设施的影响。

title: Climate mitigation potential for targeted forestation published in Science Advances
titleCn: 针对性造林的气候减缓潜力研究发表于 Science Advances
summary: Our study in Science Advances evaluates the climate mitigation potential of targeted forestation after considering climate change, fires, and albedo effects.
summaryCn: 我们发表于 Science Advances 的研究在考虑气候变化、火灾和反照率效应后，评估了针对性造林的气候减缓潜力。

title: Asymmetric sensitivity of boreal forest resilience published in Nature Ecology & Evolution
titleCn: 北方森林恢复力的不对称敏感性研究发表于 Nature Ecology & Evolution
summary: Our research reveals asymmetric sensitivity of boreal forest resilience to forest gain and loss, published in Nature Ecology & Evolution.
summaryCn: 我们的研究揭示了北方森林恢复力对森林增加和减少的不对称敏感性，发表于 Nature Ecology & Evolution。

title: Urgent need to improve modelled sensitivity of evaporation to vegetation change
titleCn: 迫切需要改进蒸发对植被变化敏感性的模拟
summary: Published in Nature Water, this study highlights the urgent need to improve how Earth system models represent the sensitivity of evaporation to vegetation change.
summaryCn: 发表于 Nature Water 的本研究强调了迫切需要改进地球系统模型对蒸发对植被变化敏感性的表征。

title: Extreme climate sparks record boreal wildfires and carbon surge in 2023
titleCn: 极端气候引发2023年破纪录的北方野火和碳激增
summary: Our study published in The Innovation documents how extreme climate conditions sparked record boreal wildfires and a carbon surge in 2023.
summaryCn: 我们发表于 The Innovation 的研究记录了极端气候条件如何引发2023年破纪录的北方野火和碳激增。

title: Prof. Zeng selected as Changjiang Distinguished Professor
titleCn: 曾老师入选长江学者特聘教授
summary: Professor Zhenzhong Zeng was selected for the Changjiang Distinguished Professor award in Earth System Science by the Ministry of Education of China.
summaryCn: 曾振中教授入选教育部长江学者特聘教授（地球系统科学）。

title: Prof. Zeng received AOGS HS Kamide Lecture Award
titleCn: 曾老师获AOGS HS鹰见讲座奖
summary: Professor Zeng received the Kamide Lecture Award at the 19th Asia Oceania Geosciences Society (AOGS) annual meeting.
summaryCn: 曾振中教授在第19届亚洲大洋洲地球科学学会（AOGS）年会上获得鹰见讲座奖。

title: Doubling of annual forest carbon loss over the tropics published in Nature Sustainability
titleCn: 热带年度森林碳损失翻倍研究发表于 Nature Sustainability
summary: Our study published in Nature Sustainability (Cover) reveals that annual forest carbon loss over the tropics has doubled during the early twenty-first century.
summaryCn: 我们发表于 Nature Sustainability（封面）的研究揭示了21世纪初热带地区年度森林碳损失已经翻倍。

title: Prof. Zeng received Qiushi Outstanding Young Scholar Award
titleCn: 曾老师获求是杰出青年学者奖
summary: Professor Zhenzhong Zeng received the prestigious Qiushi Outstanding Young Scholar Award.
summaryCn: 曾振中教授荣获求是杰出青年学者奖。

title: A reversal in global terrestrial stilling published in Nature Climate Change
titleCn: 全球陆地风速静止逆转研究发表于 Nature Climate Change
summary: Our study published in Nature Climate Change reveals a reversal in global terrestrial stilling and its implications for wind energy production.
summaryCn: 我们发表于 Nature Climate Change 的研究揭示了全球陆地风速静止的逆转及其对风能产量的影响。

title: Highland cropland expansion and forest loss in Southeast Asia published in Nature Geoscience
titleCn: 东南亚高地农田扩张与森林损失研究发表于 Nature Geoscience
summary: Our study in Nature Geoscience documents large increases in cultivated areas in Southeast Asian highlands that have evolved from forests.
summaryCn: 我们发表于 Nature Geoscience 的研究记录了东南亚高地耕种面积的大幅增加，这些区域由森林演变而来。

title: Climate mitigation from vegetation biophysical feedbacks published in Nature Climate Change
titleCn: 植被生物物理反馈的气候减缓效应研究发表于 Nature Climate Change
summary: Our study in Nature Climate Change shows that global greening has slowed down the rise in global land-surface air temperature by 0.09 ± 0.02 °C since 1982.
summaryCn: 我们发表于 Nature Climate Change 的研究表明，自1982年以来全球变绿已减缓全球地表气温上升0.09 ± 0.02 °C。
